category_sources: source_facts.description identifies hercules as a System/370, ESA/390, and z/Architecture emulator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives hercules; source_facts.homepage is the SDL Hercules official documentation site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official SDL Hercules HTML documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/SDL-Hercules-390/hyperion, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names the emulated IBM mainframe architectures.
